creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-15 22:05:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/libburn        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  libburnia is a project for reading, mastering and writing optical
  discs. Currently it is comprised of libraries named libisofs,
  libburn, libisoburn, a cdrecord emulator named cdrskin, and an
  integrated multi-session tool named xorriso.
  
  WWW: http://libburnia-project.org/
  
  PR:             ports/128794
  Submitted by:   J.R. Oldroyd <fbsd at opal.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3252    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/devel/libburn/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/libburn/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/libburn/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/devel/libburn/pkg-plist (new)
